| **Issuer** | Nordhavn Industri AB (publ), a Swedish public limited liability company (Reg. no. 559XXX-1234) | *Indicative Terms table* |
| **Guarantors** | Nordhavn Group AB (parent); each material subsidiary representing >5% of group EBITDA or assets, tested on an "iterative testing" basis at each interest payment date | *Indicative Terms table — Guarantors row* |
| **Instrument type** | Senior Secured Callable Floating Rate Notes; ranking senior secured, pari passu among the notes, senior to all subordinated debt | *Indicative Terms table — Instrument & Ranking rows* |
| **Principal amount** | SEK 1,500,000,000 initial; framework amount up to SEK 2,500,000,000 (allows up to SEK 1,000m in tap issues subject to incurrence test) | *Indicative Terms table — Initial principal amount & Framework amount rows* |
| **Coupon** | Floating: 3-month STIBOR (0.00% floor) + 4.75% per annum margin; paid quarterly in arrears on 12 Mar / 12 Jun / 12 Sep / 12 Dec; Actual/360 day count | *Indicative Terms table — Interest rate, Interest payment dates & Day count rows* |
| **Tenor / Maturity date** | 5 years; maturity 12 June 2031 (NC2 — non-call for first 2 years) | *Indicative Terms table — Tenor row* |
| **Issue price** | 100.000% | *Indicative Terms table — Issue price row* |
| **Use of proceeds** | Refinancing of existing SEK 1,250m senior secured notes 2022/2027 in full, with the remainder for general corporate purposes including potential bolt-on acquisitions within the existing operating footprint | *Indicative Terms table — Use of proceeds row* |
| **Optional redemption schedule** | (1) Before 12 Jun 2028: make-whole call at T+50 bps; (2) 12 Jun 2028 – 11 Jun 2029: 102.375%; (3) 12 Jun 2029 – 11 Jun 2030: 101.188%; (4) From 12 Jun 2030: 100.000%. Equity claw: up to 35% of original principal redeemable at 104.75% before 12 Jun 2028 from equity offering proceeds | *Optional Redemption table & Equity claw paragraph* |
| **Change-of-control provision** | Put at 101% of principal plus accrued interest; triggered when any person or group acting in concert (other than existing controlling shareholders) acquires >50% of voting rights in Nordhavn Group AB | *Covenant package — Change of control section* |
| **Incurrence covenant test** | Net Interest-Bearing Debt / EBITDA ≤ 3.50x on or before the second anniversary of issue date; ≤ 3.25x thereafter. EBITDA on LTM basis; synergy add-backs permitted up to 25% of run-rate cost savings (18-month look-forward cap) | *Covenant package — Incurrence covenants section* |
| **Restricted payments basket headline** | Permitted if: (i) no event of default; (ii) pro forma Net IBRD/EBITDA ≤ 3.00x; and (iii) aggregate restricted payments since issue date ≤ 50% of consolidated net income since issue date, plus a SEK 50m starter basket | *Covenant package — Restricted payments section* |
| **Negative pledge headline** | Neither Issuer nor any Guarantor may create or permit security interests over assets, with permitted carve-outs including: existing security at issue date, security on notes, operation-of-law security, after-acquired property security existing at acquisition, and a general basket of **SEK 75m** in aggregate | *Covenant package — Negative pledge section* |
| **Trustee / Security Agent / Paying Agent** | Trustee & Security Agent: Nordic Trustee & Agency AB (publ) (illustrative); Paying Agent: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB (publ) (illustrative) | *Indicative Terms table — Trustee / Security Agent & Paying agent rows* |
| **Listing exchange** | Corporate Bond List of Nasdaq Stockholm; admission to trading within 60 days of issue date | *Indicative Terms table — Listing row* |
| **Governing law** | Swedish law | *Indicative Terms table — Governing law row* |

|---|---|

| **Guarantors (if any)** | None at issuance. The Issuer covenants to procure within 90 days an upstream guarantee from any subsidiary acquired or established post-issuance that represents more than 10% of group EBITDA | (Indicative Terms table — "Guarantors") |
| **Instrument type** | Senior Unsecured Floating Rate Notes (Green Bond), ranking pari passu with all other senior unsecured indebtedness | (Indicative Terms table — "Instrument" and "Ranking") |
| **Principal amount** | EUR 250,000,000 (initial); tap issuance permitted up to a framework amount of EUR 500,000,000, subject to incurrence test | (Indicative Terms table — "Initial principal amount" and "Framework amount") |
| **Coupon** | Floating: 3-month EURIBOR (floor: 0.00%) + 3.25% per annum margin; payable quarterly in arrears on 18 Mar / 18 Jun / 18 Sep / 18 Dec; Day count: Actual/360. Step-up: margin increases by 25 bps if Sustainalytics ESG rating falls below "Medium Risk" at any annual review (90-day cure period) | (Indicative Terms table — "Interest rate", "Step-up provision", "Interest payment dates", "Day count") |
| **Tenor / Maturity date** | 4 years; maturity 18 September 2030 (NC1) | (Indicative Terms table — "Tenor") |
| **Issue price** | 100.000% | (Indicative Terms table — "Issue price") |
| **Use of proceeds** | Net proceeds to be applied to (i) refinancing of existing EUR 200m senior unsecured notes 2022/2027 and (ii) financing or refinancing of Eligible Green Projects (onshore/offshore wind, green hydrogen electrolyser capacity) as defined in the Green Bond Framework | (Indicative Terms table — "Use of proceeds"; Green Bond Framework section) |
| **Optional redemption schedule** | (1) Before 18 Sep 2027: make-whole call at Bund yield + 50 bps; (2) 18 Sep 2027 – 17 Sep 2028: 103.000%; (3) 18 Sep 2028 – 17 Sep 2029: 101.500%; (4) From 18 Sep 2029: 100.000% (increased to 100.500% if Scope 1 & 2 emissions reduction of ≥30% vs. 2022 baseline not achieved by 31 Dec 2029) | (Optional Redemption table; Sustainability-linked early redemption clause) |
| **Change-of-control provision** | Put at 101% of principal plus accrued interest; triggered if any person or group acting in concert (excluding existing controlling shareholder group, pension funds or sovereign wealth funds) acquires, directly or indirectly, more than 50% of voting rights in the Issuer | (Covenant package — "Change of control") |
| **Incurrence covenant test** | (1) Net Debt / EBITDA ≤ 5.00x (EBITDA adjusted to add back start-up losses from greenfield renewables for 24 months from commercial operation date); (2) Net Debt / RCF ≤ 6.50x. Carve-outs include: super senior RCF up to EUR 150m; non-recourse project finance up to EUR 750m aggregate; acquired debt up to EUR 50m per transaction; hedging in ordinary course; general basket of EUR 75m | (Covenant package — "Incurrence covenants" and "Permitted debt baskets") |
| **Restricted payments basket headline** | Restricted payments permitted if: (1) no event of default is continuing; (2) Net Debt / EBITDA ≤ 4.25x pro forma; and (3) aggregate restricted payments since issue date do not exceed a starter basket of EUR 25m plus 50% of consolidated net income since issue date | (Covenant package — "Restricted payments") |
| **Negative pledge headline** | Issuer and Material Subsidiaries may not create or permit security over assets to secure financial indebtedness; carve-outs include: project SPV security (consistent with permitted project finance basket), security existing at issue date, tax/statutory/bank-account security in ordinary course, and a general basket of EUR 30m in aggregate | (Covenant package — "Negative pledge") |
| **Trustee / Paying agent** | Bond Trustee: Nordic Trustee AS (illustrative); Paying Agent: Nordic Trustee AS (illustrative) | (Indicative Terms table — "Bond Trustee" and "Paying agent") |
| **Listing exchange** | Oslo Børs ABM (Alternative Bond Market), Sustainable Bond segment | (Indicative Terms table — "Listing") |
| **Governing law** | Norwegian law | (Indicative Terms table — "Governing law") |

| **Use of proceeds** | Proceeds will be applied to (i) refinance three secured bank facilities (totalling ~EUR 285m) maturing 2027/2028, (ii) acquire a logistics property portfolio in Greater Copenhagen and Malmö (~EUR 95m), and (iii) general corporate purposes. | (Indicative Terms table — "Use of proceeds") |
| **Optional redemption schedule** | (1) Before 5 Nov 2028: make-whole call at Bund yield + 50 bps; (2) 5 Nov 2028 – 4 Nov 2029: 102.125%; (3) 5 Nov 2029 – 4 Nov 2030: 101.063%; (4) From 5 Nov 2030: 100.000%. Equity claw: up to 40% of notes redeemable at 104.25% before 5 Nov 2028 from equity proceeds. Tax call at par (customary). | (Optional Redemption table; "Equity claw" and "Tax call" paragraphs) |
| **Change-of-control provision** | Put at **101%** of principal plus accrued interest. Triggered if any person/group (other than existing controlling shareholder and affiliates) acquires >**50%** of voting rights in Karelis Property Holding A/S or the Issuer; or if the existing controlling shareholder ceases to hold ≥**30%** of voting rights in Karelis Property Holding A/S. | (Covenant package — "Change of control") |
| **Incurrence covenant test** | Incurrence basis: (i) Consolidated LTV ≤ **55%**; (ii) Secured LTV ≤ **45%**; (iii) Net ICR ≥ **1.75x** (LTM basis) — all tested pro forma for any new financial indebtedness. Maintenance covenants (tested each interest payment date): LTV ≤ **60%**; ICR ≥ **1.50x**; Liquidity ≥ EUR 25m. | (Covenant package — "Financial covenants (incurrence basis)" / "Maintenance covenants") |
| **Restricted payments basket headline** | Permitted only if: (i) no event of default; (ii) consolidated LTV ≤ 50% pro forma; (iii) ICR ≥ 2.00x pro forma; and (iv) aggregate restricted payments do not exceed a **starter basket of EUR 15m** plus **50% of consolidated FFO** since the issue date. | (Covenant package — "Restricted payments") |
| **Negative pledge headline** | Standard real-estate negative pledge with carve-outs for: (i) propco-level mortgage security (consistent with permitted mortgage debt basket); (ii) statutory and bank account security in the ordinary course; and (iii) a **general basket of EUR 20m** in aggregate. | (Covenant package — "Negative pledge") |
| **Trustee / Paying agent** | Security Agent / Trustee: Nordic Trustee & Agency AB (publ) (illustrative). Paying Agent: Danske Bank A/S (illustrative). | (Indicative Terms table — "Trustee / Security Agent" / "Paying agent") |
| **Listing exchange** | Nasdaq Copenhagen, Corporate Bonds segment | (Indicative Terms table — "Listing") |
| **Governing law** | Danish law (Swedish law governs security documents relating to Swedish-situated properties) | (Indicative Terms table — "Governing law") |
